folio.label: 83v
folio.l: Why q¶ this Sompnour , ride ©e than or gon

note.notetxt: 169There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: In sondry shap~ , and nat alwey in oon
For we q¶ he , wyln vs swicú formes make
As most able is , oure preyes for to take
What maketú ©ow , to han al this labour
Ful many a cause , leue sire Sompnour
Seide this fende , but al thyngö hatú tyme
The day is short , and it is passed pryme
And ©et ne wan I , no thyng in this day
I wol entende , to wynnyngö if I may
And nat entende , oure wyttes to declare
For brother myn , thy wyt is al to bare
To vnderstonde , al thougú I told he~ thee
But for thow axest , why laboren we
For somtyme we ben , goddis Instrumentis
And meenes to do , his comaundementis
Whan that hi~ list , vp on his creaturis
In diuäse actes , and in dyuers fyguris
Witú outen hi~ , we han no mygút certayne
If that hi~ list , to stonden there a gayne
And somtyme at oure preyer , han we leue
Oonly the body , and nat the soule greue
Wytnesse on Iob , whom that we dedyn woo
And somtyme han we mygút , of bothe twoo
This is to seyn , of soule and body eke
And somtyme be we , suffred for to seke
Vp on a man , and do his soule vnrest
And nat his body , and al is for the best
Whan he witústondetú , oure temptaciou~
It is the cause of his , saluaciou~
Al be it , that it was , nat oure entente
He shulde be saf , but that we wold hi~ hente
And somtyme be we , serunt vn to man
As to the Erchebusshop~ , Seynt Dunstan
And to the Apostles , seruau~t eke was I
¢ ñet telle me q¶ the Sompnour feitúfully
Make ©e ©ow newe bodyes , thus alwey
Of Elementis , the fend answered nay
Sumtyme we feyne , and sumtyme we aryse
Witú dede bodyes , in ful sondry wyse
And speke as renably , and faire and wel
As to Phitonissa , dide Samuel
And ©et wyl som~e men seyn , it was nat he
I do no force , of ©oure dyuynyte
But of o thyngö I warne the , I wol nat Iape
Thow wolt algates wete , how we be shape
Thow shalt here afterward , my brother deere
